difficulty_toggles.name: Strength-Adjusted Enemies
difficulty_toggles.description: Enemy count = crew size + enemy modifiers. Scales encounters to crew strength.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: ENCOUNTER: Enemy count equals your crew size, plus any enemy-specific modifiers.

difficulty_toggles.name: Money is Tight
difficulty_toggles.description: Upkeep: 0 for 1 crew, 1 for 2-4, +1 per crew past 4. Find Patron/Repair Kit cost 1 cr. No free hull repair. Credit rewards D6-1 (min 1).
difficulty_toggles.instruction: ECONOMY: Upkeep 0/1/+1 per crew past 4. Find Patron & Repair Kit cost 1 cr each. No free hull repair. Credit rewards: D6-1 (min 1).

difficulty_toggles.name: Slower Progression
difficulty_toggles.description: Increased XP costs and unchanged max levels: Reactions 8 XP (max 4), Combat Skill 8 XP (max +3), Speed 5 XP (max 8"), Savvy 5 XP (max +5), Toughness 8 XP (max 5), Luck 10 XP (max 3).
difficulty_toggles.instruction: PROGRESSION: XP costs — Reactions 8 (max 4), Combat 8 (max +3), Speed 5 (max 8"), Savvy 5 (max +5), Toughness 8 (max 5), Luck 10 (max 3).

difficulty_toggles.name: Veteran Enemy
difficulty_toggles.instruction: COMBAT: One basic enemy has +1 Combat Skill (Veteran).

difficulty_toggles.name: Actually Specialized
difficulty_toggles.description: Specialist enemies have minimum Combat Skill +1 and Toughness 4.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: COMBAT: Specialists get minimum Combat +1, Toughness 4.

difficulty_toggles.name: Armored Leaders
difficulty_toggles.description: Lieutenants get a 5+ Armor saving throw.

difficulty_toggles.name: Better Leadership
difficulty_toggles.description: Unique Individuals appear on 7+ (not 9+). For enemy types that cannot have a Unique Individual, a random enemy gets +2 Combat Skill and +2 Toughness (max +4 / T6).
difficulty_toggles.instruction: COMBAT: Unique Individuals on 7+ (not 9+). If enemy type has no UI, a random enemy gets +2 Combat/Toughness (max +4/T6).

difficulty_toggles.name: Paying by the Hour
difficulty_toggles.description: Battle has a round limit: 2D6 (pick highest) + 4. Must complete objective before time runs out.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: TIME: Round limit = 2D6 pick highest + 4. Complete objective before time expires.

difficulty_toggles.name: Movement All Over
difficulty_toggles.description: Each round including the first: Roll D6. If result <= round number, +1 enemy arrives.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: TIME: Each round (including Round 1), roll D6. If D6 <= round number, +1 enemy spawns.

difficulty_toggles.name: Fickle Scans
difficulty_toggles.description: Notable Sights markers are removed after Round 3.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: TIME: Notable Sights markers removed after Round 3. Grab them early!

difficulty_toggles.name: Starting in the Gutter
difficulty_toggles.description: Three sub-options (use 1-3): (1) Start with only 3 Low-Tech Weapons rolls + 1 Gear or Gadget roll, no free Military/Hi-Tech rolls, no 1cr/crew. (2) Begin with only 3 crew instead of 6. (3) Begin without a ship — must purchase one (Core Rules p.60).
difficulty_toggles.instruction: START: (1) Only 3 Low-Tech + 1 Gear/Gadget roll, no Military/Hi-Tech, no 1cr/crew. (2) Only 3 crew. (3) No starting ship.

difficulty_toggles.name: Reduced Lethality
difficulty_toggles.description: Before rolling post-battle injuries, if 2+ characters are injured, select one to be exempt — they recover fully with no Sick Bay time (works for biological, Soulless, or Bot). If only 1 character is injured, roll normally.
difficulty_toggles.instruction: COMBAT: If 2+ injured post-battle, exempt 1 from injury roll (full recovery, no Sick Bay). If only 1 injured, roll normally.

cautious.base_condition: If in Cover and visible opponents within 12", move away to most distant position that remains in Cover and in range with Line of Sight, then fire.

actions.action: Retreat a full move, remaining in Cover. Maintain Line of Sight if possible.
Remain in place or maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Remain in place or maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Advance to within 12" of the nearest enemy and fire. Remain in Cover.
Advance to within 12" of the nearest enemy and fire. Remain in Cover.
Advance on the nearest enemy and fire, ending in Cover if possible.

aggressive.base_condition: If able to engage an opponent in brawling combat this round, advance to do so.

actions.action: Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Advance to the next forward position in Cover. Fire if eligible.
Advance and fire on the nearest enemy. Use Cover.
Advance and fire on the nearest enemy. Fastest route.
Dash towards the nearest enemy. Fastest route.

tactical.base_condition: If in Cover and within 12" of visible opponents, remain in position and fire.

actions.action: Remain in place to fire.
Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Advance to the next forward position in Cover or move to flank.
Advance to the next forward position in Cover or move to flank.
Advance and fire on the nearest enemy. Use Cover.
Advance and fire on the nearest enemy. Use Cover.

defensive.base_condition: If in Cover and opponents in the open are visible, remain in position and fire.

actions.action: Remain in place to fire.
Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Maneuver within current Cover to fire.
Advance to the next forward position in Cover.
Advance and fire on the nearest enemy. Use Cover.

entries.effect: On their next activation, they do not remove a Stun marker automatically. Ignore this result if already Dazed.
Move at half speed. Reduce Combat Skill by 1 (can go to -1). If Wounded again, they are a Goner.
The character is removed from play.
On their next activation, do not remove a Stun marker automatically. Ignore if already shut down.
Mark with token. Every activation, roll D6: on 6, falls apart and removed. Multiple instances no effect. +1 to future casualty rolls.
The character is removed from play.
Move 2" directly away from the firer per hit inflicted by the attack.
Roll D6 at end of next activation: On 1, Bleeding ends. On 6, they are a Goner. +1 to future injury rolls. Multiple instances no effect.
The character is removed from play.

casualty_tables._cleanup: All Bleeding/Damaged/Wounded conditions removed at end of battle, no long-term effects.

detailed_injury_table.name: Death
detailed_injury_table.effect: The character is slain. A random item they carried is damaged.

detailed_injury_table.name: Critical Strike
detailed_injury_table.effect: Is the character wearing Armor? If so, they survive but the armor is damaged. Otherwise, they are slain.

detailed_injury_table.name: Extensive Injury
detailed_injury_table.effect: Requires specialized treatment. Roll 1D6+1 for cost in Credits. Cannot take crew tasks or fight until paid. Sick Bay begins after treatment.

detailed_injury_table.name: Item Hit
detailed_injury_table.effect: Randomly select a carried item and roll 1D6. On 1-4 it is damaged. On 5-6 it is destroyed.

detailed_injury_table.name: Lingering Injury
detailed_injury_table.effect: After recovery, before every mission roll 1D6: On 1, cannot participate. On 2-5, fine. On 6, fully recovered (remove condition). Multiple lingering injuries roll separately.

detailed_injury_table.name: Injured Arm
detailed_injury_table.effect: Combat Skill counts as 1 lower (min -1) when firing non-Pistol weapons or Brawling. 3 Credits medical treatment to remove.

detailed_injury_table.name: Injured Leg
detailed_injury_table.effect: Reduce Speed by 1". 3 Credits medical treatment to remove.

detailed_injury_table.name: Injured Torso
detailed_injury_table.effect: Knocked out after two Stun markers instead of three. 3 Credits medical treatment to remove.

lunging.description: A Lunging character is immediately moved a full move towards the shooter, attempting to enter Brawling combat.
lunging.instruction: DRAMATIC COMBAT: Lunging — character moves full move toward shooter to Brawl. Ignores up to 2" movement reduction. Once per round. Does not affect normal activation.

dramatic_combat_rules.dramatic_weapons_note: If using Dramatic Weapons (Compendium pp.88-89), many weapon stats change (e.g., Blade +1 Damage, Blast Pistol 6" range, Boarding Saber +2 Damage, etc.). Use with Adjusted Shooting hit numbers from p.87.
